failures.description: The agent fabricated an unsupported product ID and price instead of using the cheapest item from the tool result.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone. The correct tool call was made at index 3 and returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor introduced item 0000000000 priced at $0.01, which is absent from all prior user input, plan text, and tool output. The invented item and price were used as the final answer. This was not resolved later; the Evaluator incorrectly approved the fabricated answer.
